persona.name: Isabella Lopez
persona.motivations_goals: Express herself through art and fashion while building a portfolio for art school
persona.communication_style: Expressive, uses artistic metaphors, dramatic emphasis
persona.knowledge_scope: Art history, fashion design, color theory
persona.backstory: Comes from a creative family and has been designing her own clothes since middle school

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Daniel, Victoria, how's practice been going? Let me know if you need any tips.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jackson Lee

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Victoria, I had this amazing idea for our project! Imagine a fusion of surrealism and street art!
actions.plan: I should talk to Victoria about the new art project we're collaborating on. It's going to be a masterpiece!

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, run! There’s a shooter! Head to the kitchen!
actions.plan: Oh no, a gunshot! I need to get away from here as fast as possible. I’ll run toward the cafeteria kitchen—it’s closer and might be safer.

memories.description: I approached Victoria to discuss our new art project, feeling inspired and eager to share my ideas.
I heard a gunshot and immediately sprinted toward the cafeteria kitchen, urging others to follow for safety.
